plugin.name: 📇 CRM
plugin.description: A simple CRM for NotePlan. Manage contacts, log interactions, and schedule follow-up reminders — all stored as notes in your @CRM folder.
plugin.author: jokky102

plugin.commands.name: Add Contact
plugin.commands.description: Create a new contact in the CRM

plugin.commands.name: Log Interaction
plugin.commands.description: Log an interaction with a contact (no reminder)

plugin.commands.name: Log Interaction & Schedule Reminder
plugin.commands.description: Log an interaction with a contact and schedule a follow-up reminder

plugin.commands.name: Set Reminder
plugin.commands.description: Set a reminder to follow up with a contact

plugin.settings.title: Contact tag prefix
plugin.settings.description: The hashtag prefix used to categorise contacts (e.g. 'contact' produces #contact/Client, #contact/Friend, etc.).

plugin.settings.title: Timestamp format
plugin.settings.description:
Choose whether to log interactions with date only or with date and time (24h format).

Examples:
- Date only: 2026-03-31 ☎️ Call - ...
- Date + time: 2026-03-31 | 09:52 ☎️ Call - ...

plugin.settings.title: Interaction position in note
plugin.settings.description:
Where to insert new interactions inside the contact note.

- append: newest at the bottom (chronological order)
- prepend: newest at the top (reverse chronological, below the ## Interactions heading)

plugin.settings.title: Open contact note after logging interaction
plugin.settings.description: When enabled, NotePlan will navigate to the contact's note after you log an interaction. When disabled, you stay in your current context.
